products.name: Tai Sui Digital Energy Guidance
products.nameCN: 生肖太岁数字能量指引
products.description: Digital energy guidance service for the Dragon Year, including personalized energy analysis report, meditation audio guide, and annual energy alignment recommendations.
products.descriptionCN: 龙年数字能量指引服务，包含个人能量分析报告、冥想音频指导及年度能量调和建议。

products.name: Obsidian Energy Meditation Course
products.description: Digital meditation course focused on energy purification and spiritual protection. Includes guided meditation audio and energy practice techniques.
products.descriptionCN: 专注于能量净化和精神保护的数字冥想课程。包含引导式冥想音频及能量练习技巧。

products.name: Agarwood Meditation Audio Collection
products.description: Premium digital meditation audio collection for focus and mental clarity. Includes guided meditation sessions and energy alignment soundtracks.
products.descriptionCN: 用于专注和思维清晰的优质数字冥想音频合集。包含引导式冥想课程及能量调和音轨。

products.name: Personalized Energy Analysis Service
products.description: Comprehensive digital energy analysis service based on your birth chart. Includes detailed energy report, personalized recommendations, and one-on-one consultation session.
products.descriptionCN: 基于您出生图表的综合数字能量分析服务。包含详细能量报告、个性化建议及一对一咨询课程。
